svg.text: Outboard Tiller Autopilot with ICM-20948 DMP 9-Axis Compass
⏚ GND BUS — Common Ground (ESP32 · H-Bridge · Op-Amp · ICM-20948 · Joystick · Switches · LEDs)

g.text: • All switches: INPUT_PULLUP (internal pullup, LOW=active) — switch connects GPIO to GND when closed
• I2C pullups provided by ESP32 internally (no external resistors needed)
• GPIO34 is input-only — no internal pullup available · H-Bridge EN must be HIGH for motor

svg.text: v2.14 schematic rev3 — I2C internal pullups, rerouted wires, switch colors (green/red), pot colors (yellow/grey)
